model_phrasing: gpt-5 family detected from the system prompt; Phrasing profile id RTM-PH6OCQ6MX4

frame.objective: Bring PR 346 to release-readiness with release_readiness_gap_count == 0, including throughput geometric mean >= 1.10, allocation geometric mean <= 0.90, every allocation row <= 1.05, retained and cleanup walls held, and established-row regressions == 0.

allowed: Read the frame, PKR-P2 failure, DKR-P11A empty checkpoint, DKR-P11B progress map, exact diff, and workloads.
forbidden: Edit, steer, measure, build variants, change targets, commit, push, merge, release, publish, or deploy.

frame.human_confirmation_boundary: Only the human changes the frame.

assignment: Independently challenge two live hypotheses. H1: the full lazy-state candidate can meet the frozen performance target. H2: measuring the four DKR-P11B separable variants is the smallest defensible next route. Recompute the 2/3/5 context trees and all seven candidate materialization counts from source and workloads. Verify the four variants are actually build-separable and that V4's stronger divergence ranking is only a source hypothesis. Return intact, drifted, or dead for H1 and H2 with exact refs. Review CKR-PERFORMANCE, DKR-P11A, DKR-P11B, PKR-P1, and PKR-P2 as keep, reshape, or drop. Propose at most one next DKR; do not steer or accept your own verdict.
hand_back_rule: Mark a hypothesis drifted when required evidence is missing; do not fill gaps with judgement.
output_schema: Use the exact challenger verdict and first_principles_contribution_review blocks from references/roles/challenger.md.
required_sentence: DKRs are discovery-worker scopes; PKRs are progression-worker execution units; there is no CKR worker.
